titleEn: Anitox introduces AvrX™Prime™ as focus shifts toward performance consistency
contentHtml:
LAWRENCEVILLE, Ga. — Consistently delivering feed conversion, flock uniformity and growth performance becomes more challenging when every flock brings a different mix of feed, health and management pressure. With the launch […]
